The Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Toronto Raptors 115-105 in Game 2 of their first-round NBA playoff series, with Donovan Mitchell scoring 30 points and James Harden adding 28, giving Cleveland a commanding 2-0 lead heading to Game 3 in Toronto[3][2][1]. Raptors ruled out key guard Immanuel Quickley
